## Checklist

- [ ] The link is official, primary, or clearly credible.
- [ ] The entry fits the selected category.
- [ ] The README table still renders correctly.
- [ ] The entry is not a duplicate.
- [ ] The description is factual and concise.
- [ ] This is not promotional spam.
